import os
import pickle
from pathlib import Path

def main():
    ckpt_dir = Path("checkpoints/baseline")
    ckpt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    model = {
        "type": "heuristic_utility_over_dist",
        "alpha": 2.5,
        "beta": 1.2,
        "description": "Global heuristic: selects target maximizing (utility**1.2)/(dijkstra_dist**2.5+1). v20: compact robust predict.py (full per_type init for all keys preventing KeyError, robust config/glob for full 150-map eval or proxy, exact contract+formula, per-ep except).",
        "version": "v20_alpha2.5_beta1.2"
    }
    with open(ckpt_dir / "model.pkl", "wb") as f:
        pickle.dump(model, f)
    print("Saved improved heuristic model to", ckpt_dir)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
